rules.description: Windows-style shortcuts -> Cmd equivalents (Ctrl+Y = Redo/Cmd+Shift+Z; excludes terminals)
Windows-style Alt+Tab -> Cmd+Tab application switcher (hold Alt, tap Tab to cycle; Alt+Shift+Tab cycles backward); un-minimizes the focused app's windows once the switch settles

to_if_invoked.shell_command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell (first process whose frontmost is true) to set value of attribute "AXMinimized" of (every window whose value of attribute "AXMinimized" is true) to false'

rules.description: Windows-style Alt+` -> Cmd+` cycle between windows of the focused app (Alt+Shift+` cycles backward)
Browser (Chrome/Edge) Ctrl+L -> Cmd+L (focus/select the address bar)
Finder Cmd+Q -> Cmd+Option+W (close all Finder windows)
Browser (Chrome/Edge) Ctrl+1..9 -> Cmd+1..9 (jump to tab N; Ctrl+9 = last tab)
IDE (VS Code & forks) Ctrl+Shift+P -> Cmd+Shift+P (open the command palette)
